name.en: National Health Mission — Ayushman Bharat Health & Wellness Centre
name.hi: राष्ट्रीय स्वास्थ्य मिशन — आयुष्मान भारत स्वास्थ्य एवं कल्याण केंद्र

config.mp_action: Forward to the Chief Medical & Health Officer (CMHO) / District Health Society for inclusion in the NHM Programme Implementation Plan (PIP).
config.notes: Public health sub-centres, PHCs/CHCs and health-and-wellness-centre upgrades. Cite population-per-facility or facility-condition gap in the justification.
